title: Checklist evidence remains active despite deferral notes
recommendation: Carry forward until checklist evidence is either backfilled with concrete citations or completion metadata is relabeled to reflect deferred evidence.

title: Singular advisor skill-root defaults remain in live rebuild and scan surfaces
recommendation: Carry forward from iteration 005 until skill_graph_scan, advisor_rebuild, tests, schemas, feature catalog, and dist outputs are aligned to .opencode/skills.

title: scripts/dist still contains stale singular .opencode/skill references
recommendation: Carry forward until generated scripts/dist references are rebuilt or intentionally patched.

title: 4-runtime agent mirror bodies remain out of parity
recommendation: Carry forward until runtime mirrors are reconciled except explicitly allowed runtime-specific metadata/frontmatter.

title: The new 093 playbooks are not reachable from their owning skill files
scopeProof: `rg "manual_testing_playbook" .opencode/skills/sk-code-review/SKILL.md .opencode/skills/sk-git/SKILL.md` exits 1 while both playbook roots exist.
recommendation: Link each playbook root from its owning SKILL.md, ideally near the related resources or verification sections.

title: spec_folder is interpolated into executable workflow commands before containment is enforced
recommendation: Carry forward until spec-folder validation is centralized and workflow command/writer paths consume only sanitized repo-local specs paths.

title: audit_descriptions.py still passes the zero-inventory stub case that 098/006 requires to fail
recommendation: Add a default non-zero exit for zero audited items; make any intentionally-empty mode explicit with a flag.

title: Smart-router validation false-fails valid shared CLI router references
scopeProof: All four CLI skills link to ../system-spec-kit/references/cli/*.md, and both shared target files exist; the validator checks skill_dir / resource after extracting only the references/... suffix.
recommendation: Resolve markdown links with parent segments or add an explicit shared-resource allowlist/schema before classifying paths as missing.

title: Resolver containment remains insufficient as a standalone helper
recommendation: Resolve through P1-019 by making the resolver reject absolute paths, parent traversal, unresolved placeholders, and paths outside approved specs roots.

title: Prior P2 carried from earlier review state
recommendation: Retain until the prior registry entry is resolved or downgraded by a targeted pass.

title: Copilot target-authority guard is still non-functional in the imported module
recommendation: Implement and export buildCopilotPromptArg/validateSpecFolder in source and dist, or remove the Copilot branch's authority-guard claims until the helper exists and is tested.

title: Singular schema/default text remains beyond code-graph policy
recommendation: Carry forward until singular root text in source schemas and generated dist references is resolved.

title: 098/003 target-file evidence cites a stale smart-router line range
scopeProof: `check-smart-router.sh` ends at line 357, so the claimed :386-394 range cannot resolve; the zero-coverage behavior exists at :343-353.
recommendation: Update the implementation-summary row to cite check-smart-router.sh:343-353 or avoid exact line ranges in resource-map seed data for summaries that are not maintained as live evidence.

resourceMapSeed.caveat: plural path claims match; zero-inventory guard absent

name: memory_handback_cross_cli_refs
notes: Authored links resolve to the shared system-spec-kit reference. Existing P1-021 is validator-resolution drift, not a missing target file.

name: playbook_skill_links
notes: Playbook packages exist, but owning SKILL.md files do not reference `manual_testing_playbook`.

name: system_spec_kit_legacy_sk_deep_refs
notes: Non-archive system-spec-kit spec docs still contain many `sk-deep-*` mentions, but sampled hits are historical packet, scratch, changelog, research, or prompt records rather than live command, agent, or install-guide surfaces. No new required finding from this pass.
